article_title: Barclays, Stifel lift S&P 500 target to 7,800 on strong earnings outlook
rationale: Barclays and Stifel raised their S&P 500 index target to 7,800, citing a strong tech earnings outlook.

article_title: Nvidia, Micron, AMD lead tech sell-off as AI trade cools
rationale: Major tech constituents like Nvidia, Micron, and AMD lead a sector-wide sell-off as the AI trade cools, directly dragging down the tech-heavy index.

article_title: Week Ahead for FX, Bonds: U.S. Inflation Data in Focus as Prospects of Fed Rate Hike Increase - WSJ
rationale: Increasing prospects of a Fed rate hike due to inflation concerns pose a negative outlook for rate-sensitive small-cap stocks.

article_title: Micron earnings are set to send the market on a wild ride — and a new ETF may add to the volatility - CNBC
rationale: Micron, the fourth-largest holding in SMH, is set to report earnings, which is expected to trigger significant volatility for the ETF.

article_title: Micron’s blowout earnings reset the AI memory trade - Yahoo Finance
rationale: A global chip-stock sell-off hit semiconductor equities hard, causing Nasdaq futures and tech indices to plunge.

article_title: Nvidia, Micron, AMD lead tech sell-off as AI trade cools - Yahoo Finance
rationale: Major technology stocks led a sector-wide sell-off as investors shifted to risk-off mode amid cooling AI trade.

article_title: Tech Stocks Set to Bounce After $1.3 Trillion Rout on AI Jitters - Bloomberg.com
rationale: US technology stocks are poised to rebound following a massive $1.3 trillion market value decline driven by AI valuation concerns.

article_title: Lithium producers bet on battery storage as demand shifts beyond EVs - Reuters
rationale: Lithium producers are pivoting towards battery storage applications as demand patterns shift beyond electric vehicles.

article_title: Precious Metals Extend Losing Streak - WSJ
rationale: Precious metals extend their losing streak as macro challenges are expected to persist in the near term.

article_title: Gold hits over seven-month low as dollar firms, rate hike bets rise - Reuters
rationale: Gold prices hit a seven-month low due to a strengthening dollar and rising expectations of interest rate hikes.
